tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(11,18): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'self'.

tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(15,16): error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(15,17): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(15,20): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(16,1): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(18,13): error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(18,14): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'b'.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(18,15): error TLUA1144: '{' or ';' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(19,1): error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(22,19): error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(22,20): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(23,1): error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua(26,10): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Unknown'.


==== tluaColonFunctionErrors.tlua (15 errors) ====
    local M = {};
    
    function M:bar(v: number): number
      return v;
    end
    
    // The colon call form supplies the receiver implicitly.
    M:bar(1);
    
    // `self` is already declared by the colon.
    function M:clash(self: number): void
              ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier ':'.
                     ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'self'.
    end
    
    // At most one colon segment, and nothing may follow it.
    function M:deep.f(): void
               ~~~~
!!! error TLUA7010: 'deep', which lacks return-type annotation, implicitly has an 'any' return type.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
                    ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
    
    function M:a:b(): void
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
                 ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'b'.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1144: '{' or ';' expected.
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
    
    // `local function` takes a plain name.
    local function Bad:f(): void
                      ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '(' expected.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'f'.
    end
    ~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
    
    // Unknown base.
    function Unknown:f(): void
             ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Unknown'.
    end
